creator: dhchen@dhchen.com
text:
Recently I installed and run mldonkey-current. After running mldonkey kernel becomes very unstable. Systems panics unexpectedly. First I thought it's about the kernel I used(about one month ago), so I updated to newest kernel, but the problem still there. It panics at network stack, so maybe it's not the donkey's problem.


kernel stack (bt full) at panic:

#0  doadump () at pcpu.h:172
No locals.

        bootopt = 256
        newpanic = 1
        ap = 0xc29931b0 ""
        buf = "page fault", '\0' <repeats 245 times>
